ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArvinLovegood/go-stock
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArvinLovegood/go-stock
Language: go
🦄🦄🦄AI赋能股票分析：AI加持的股票分析/选股工具。股票行情获取，AI热点资讯分析，AI资金/财务分析，涨跌报警推送。支持A股，港股，美股。支持市场整体/个股情绪分析，AI辅助选股等。数据全部保留在本地。支持DeepSeek，OpenAI， Ollama，LMStudio，AnythingLLM，硅基流动，火山方舟，阿里云百炼等平台或模型。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: XTLS/Xray-core
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/XTLS/Xray-core
Language: go
Xray, Penetrates Everything. Also the best v2ray-core. Where the magic happens. An open platform for various uses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: casdoor/casdoor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/casdoor/casdoor
Language: go
An open-source Agent-first Identity and Access Management (IAM) /LLM MCP & agent gateway and auth server with web UI supporting OpenClaw, MCP, OAuth, OIDC, SAML, CAS, LDAP, SCIM, WebAuthn, TOTP, MFA, Face ID, Google Workspace, Azure AD

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gosom/google-maps-scraper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gosom/google-maps-scraper
Language: go
scrape data from Google Maps. Extracts data such as the name, address, phone number, website URL, rating, reviews number, latitude and longitude, reviews,email and more for each place

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/loki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/loki
Language: go
Like Prometheus, but for logs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform
Language: go
Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: helm/helm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/helm/helm
Language: go
The Kubernetes Package Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackc/pgx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackc/pgx
Language: go
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lima-vm/lima
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lima-vm/lima
Language: go
Linux virtual machines, with a focus on running containers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: looplj/axonhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/looplj/axonhub
Language: go
⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: maximhq/bifrost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/maximhq/bifrost
Language: go
Fastest enterprise AI gateway (50x faster than LiteLLM) with adaptive load balancer, cluster mode, guardrails, 1000+ models support & <100 µs overhead at 5k RPS.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pingcap/tidb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb
Language: go
TiDB is built for agentic workloads that grow unpredictably, with ACID guarantees and native support for transactions, analytics, and vector search. No data silos. No noisy neighbors. No infrastructure ceiling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pocketbase/pocketbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pocketbase/pocketbase
Language: go
Open Source realtime backend in 1 file

ns0:entry.ns0:title: prometheus/prometheus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus
Language: go
The Prometheus monitoring system and time series database.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: steipete/gogcli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/steipete/gogcli
Language: go
Google Suite CLI: Gmail, GCal, GDrive, GContacts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: syncthing/syncthing
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/syncthing/syncthing
Language: go
Open Source Continuous File Synchronization

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sysadminsmedia/homebox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sysadminsmedia/homebox
Language: go
A continuation of HomeBox the inventory and organization system built for the Home User

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vllm-project/semantic-router
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vllm-project/semantic-router
Language: go
System Level Intelligent Router for Mixture-of-Models at Cloud, Data Center and Edge
